steps.title: Identify what 'most but not all' requires
steps.content: The astronomer can see most stars but not all of them using a 160 mm aperture. So at least one star must require a larger aperture to detect, while the others require 160 mm or less.

steps.title: Find the data matching this requirement
steps.content: Choice C identifies only HSH95-46 as requiring an aperture greater than 160 mm. The other choices describe a different aperture, an unrelated star property, or distance rather than aperture requirements. That matches choice C — C is correct.
